title: Identifying the standard columns and user addition columns in board

posts.author: prasmadd (prasmadd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

Whenever we are creating board, the board is getting created with some predefined structure with predefined columns. Is there any way to find the columns which are default and which are added by user later?

Regards,
Prashanth

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @prasmadd!

As far as I am concerned, there is no way of retrieving that information since there is no field for the columns that will give you that context.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: prasmadd (prasmadd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday

Thank you the inputs will help.

Regards,
Prashanth
